TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-frog_lubi 2020s

S.FORM: laqi nii keeman di ma gaga tloong gakac na m.
S.TRANSL: 已經晚上了，然後這個小孩正坐在他的椅子上。
It was night already, and the kid was sitting on his chair.

S.FORM: a la kana a siyo a? taqian na qlapo na ma gaga a qmita huling nii a wa theyaq huling qmita kana anu ka anu ka qpatun.
S.TRANSL: (他坐) 在房間裡的床舖旁邊，一面看著他的狗玩耍，一面看著一隻青蛙。
(He) was (sitting) next to his bed in his room, watching his dog playing, and looking at a frog.

S.FORM: a mrebu di ma ga m tutui ka laqi nii di.
S.TRANSL: 到了早上了，小孩起床了。
In the morning, the kid got up from bed.

S.FORM: ei ei waga mtaqi di w keeman di ma ga mosa a taqi qlapo taqian na ka laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 咦？不對。他還在睡覺。晚上的時候，這個小孩在他的房間裡上床睡覺。
Well, no, that's not right. He is still sleeping. At night, this kid goes to sleep on the bed in his room.

S.FORM: ma waga naq a a hiya ka anu ka asi huling uri o siyo na om suupu taqi ga meniq a? qpatun nii uri waga nanaq ptaqiun so a henu anu ka a so kiya na hiya.
S.TRANSL: 在那邊呢，狗也在他旁邊一起睡覺。青蛙也在一旁自己睡覺。
There, the dog is also beside him, sleeping together. The frog is also there, sleeping by itself. It's just like that.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka mgrebu di na waga a tutui ka laqi nii di ma dahaka huling na.
S.TRANSL: 到了早上，小孩和他的狗都起床了。
In the morning, the kid and his dog get up.

S.FORM: waga mqiri so bais so nganguc ma mqiri so anu ka anu ka a dheran na.
S.TRANSL: 他們都在往窗外看外面的景色。
They are looking towards the window, looking at the view outside.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka kiya ka bobona dung waga anu ka musa mqir mqiri kndalax bais ka laqi nii dahaka huling nii a mus uh a musa mqiri nganguc di.
S.TRANSL: 後來呢，小孩和狗便向窗外探頭。
Afterwards, the kid and the dog poke their heads out of the window.

S.FORM: ma kiya laqi nii ga naq mqiri kndalax nganguc waga mita huling na waga musa tmalang nganguc.
S.TRANSL: 小孩從窗戶往外看，而小狗則跑到了外面去。
The kid was looking outward from the window, and the dog ran to the outside.

S.FORM: uh musa a so dmidin a m maanu di a o musa t tum waga so eniqan kana qhuni ma so sudu ga musa so tmalang waga musa theyaq nganguc ka huling.
S.TRANSL: 他們去拿，啊什麼啊？(外面)那邊有樹和草。而小狗是要跑到外面去玩。
They went to bring, wait, what? There were trees and grass (outside), and the dog ran to go play out there.

S.FORM: kika waga na osaan anu ka anu ka anu ka memux ka huling na nii di waga na lexu wa na emuxun memux wa na theyaqan nganguc hii kika wa mosa a mkkesa so uyung a sapah na.
S.TRANSL: (小孩) 到外面去抱住他的狗，一面玩耍、一面追逐跑到屋後。
(The child) went out to hug his dog, (the two) playing and chasing each other to the back of the house.

S.FORM: kika wa musa so uyung sapah na di ma waga so a mlawa ka laqi nii ma wa m waga naq lmeun mlawa ka huling nii duri.
S.TRANSL: 來到了房子的後面呢，小孩便開始呼喊，小狗也跟著吠叫呼喊著。
As they go to the back of the house, the kid starts calling out, and the dog is also barking to call out.

S.FORM: ma kika laqi nii dahaka a anu ka huling nii de o mosa betaq so a pusu qhuni di ma.
S.TRANSL: 所以小孩和狗就前往，到達了樹根處。
So the kid and the dog went to the root of the tree.

S.FORM: gaga musa mita anu ka so rudu a walu ka wada a waga musa skiya ka walu di.
S.TRANSL: 他們看著蜂窩。裡面有蜜蜂正飛出來。
They were looking at the beehive. There were bees flying out of it.

S.FORM: ma s sa ma o musa mita dungan ka siyo na so lmiqu nii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 接著他們又往山的另一邊看。
Then they went to look again to the other side of the mountains.

S.FORM: eniqan kingan a so anu ka eniqan kingan so qhuni paru a so a lmiqu ki so kdere hari eniqan beling ka qhuni.
S.TRANSL: 在某處緩坡的地方有一棵大樹，樹上有一個洞穴。
There is a big tree at a shalow slope, and there is hole in the tree.

S.FORM: qmita ka laqi wada sklui wa w mtakun di takun a tuting dheran ma kika so nii a kdere kana nii di ma wa so a wa musa tmalang ka huling nii wa musa tmalang mita laqi ga takun.
S.TRANSL: 看到了(貓頭鷹)後，小孩嚇了一跳，然後就從山坡上跌了下去。然後狗便跑去看正掉落的小孩。
Seeing (the owl), the kid is shocked, and falls from the cliff. The dog runs to see the child, who is falling.

S.FORM: ma kika laqi nii o wa musa so a o meyah dungan ka anu ka anu ka tekung nii gisu meyah skiya dungan ma w.
S.TRANSL: 然後，貓頭鷹又飛過來。
Then, the owl comes flying again.

S.FORM: w wa so a sklui ka laqi nii o miicu mesa qiyucun ta na eyahun ta na gmatuk tunux kana so.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇了一跳，心理很害怕，說：「牠要來咬我們了！牠要來啄我們的頭了！」
Being shocked, the kid was afraid, and said "It is coming to bite us! It is coming to peck on our heads!"

S.FORM: a nhuwaun mubung hari ka tunux na so m mgleeng musa ini m kika wada mdakin a bale a bobo a btunux paru ka laqi nii di.
S.TRANSL: 小孩把頭擋住，只好爬到一個大石頭上面躲起來。
The kid covered his head, and could only hide by climbing up to a large stone.

S.FORM: waga dmeeda hiya ka w w cida qhuni hiya ka uN anu ka tekung nii di ma wa qmita laqi nii wa naq tloong a toma pusu ah wa naq toma a btunux paru hii ka anu ka huling.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹(站)在樹枝上眺望，看到了小孩，獨自坐在樹枝下和石頭下。狗也在那裏。
The owl searched (standing) on a tree branch, and saw the kid, who was sitting by himself below the tree root, and below the stone. The dog was there, too.

S.FORM: kika anu ka kika wa musa laqi nii dungan waga naq wa tloong ci a cida qhuni ga ka anu ka tekung ma ga qmita dheya ma laqi nii o.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹還駐足在樹枝上看他們。
The owl still sat on the branch, looking at them.

S.FORM: wa musa a mdakin anu ka so a so bobo btutux wa mosa taapa tunux anu ka tunux anu tunux a wangjile.
S.TRANSL: (小孩) 爬到石頭上，結果騎到了一個東西的頭上。我忘記了。
(The kid) climbed up the stone, and ended up riding on the head of something. I forgot.

S.FORM: mosa taapa a taapa tunux a camac.
S.TRANSL: 他騎到了一個動物的頭上。
He went riding on the head of an animal.

S.FORM: wa musa a taapa tunux na camac ka laqi nii di.
S.TRANSL: 他騎到了一個動物的頭上。
He ends up riding on the head of an animal.

S.FORM: waga a tmalang ka anu ka anu ka camac.
S.TRANSL: 這隻動物在跑。
The animal is running.

S.FORM: buyiyangba wanglezhege wangjile.
S.TRANSL: 不一樣吧。忘了這個。忘記了。
It might be different. I forgot this part. I forgot.

S.FORM: kiya ka nii ka wada musa betaq so a tmalang hiya ka a rqenux rqenux nii di ma musa so bobo kdere di ma wada.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鹿跑到懸崖邊。
This deer runs to the edge of a cliff.

S.FORM: takun ka laqi nii kndalax kdere wada takun a betaq a truma a so eniqan qsiya so gcilung.
S.TRANSL: 小孩從懸崖摔落，掉到了某個像是湖的水裡去。
The kid fell from the cliff down into some water, which was sort of like a lake.

S.FORM: wada mosa gcilung di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他掉到了湖裡。
He fell into the lake.

S.FORM: kika qhuni kana ka nii waga so a waga a hmeru ah so kdere wa takun a gcilung laqi nii di ma qmita kndalax baro ka rqenux.
S.TRANSL: 懸崖上長滿了樹。小孩從上面跌了下去，而鹿則在上面看著。
The were trees growing on the side of the cliff, from which the child fell. The deer watched from the top.

S.FORM: kika anu ka mtakun kana dahaka huling msuupu a tuting a anu ka gcilung.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗都一起掉到湖裡去了。
Both he and the dog fell into the lake together.

S.FORM: wisu ka huling na di ma wa na kesaun iya iya squwaq iya rengac wa na kesaun ka huling na.
S.TRANSL: 他對著他的狗說：「別說話！別出聲！」
He says to his dog: "Don't speak! Don't make any noise!".

S.FORM: ma kika wada mdakin a so qhuni ah qhuni nii ka qhuni qhuni tngsebu nii ka laqi nii di ma dahaka huling ga mosa mita a bukui bukuy qhuni.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗爬到了這棵已經倒了的樹上，去看樹的後面(有什麼)。
The kid and the dog climbed up to the tree that had fallen to see (what was there in) its back.

S.FORM: a musa mita bukuy qhuni ma mita bukuy waga hiya ka ga qpatun dahaka qpatun wawaga kiya.
S.TRANSL: 他們去看樹的後面，然後看到有兩隻青蛙在那裡。
They went to look at the back of the tree, and saw two frogs over there.

S.FORM: kika waga qmita qpatun dungan ma egu ka qpatun meyah kndalax bukuy ki di meniq kndalax so a qsiya a bukuy qhuni ki di.
S.TRANSL: 他們再看，又有很多隻青蛙從樹後面湧出來。
When they looked again, they saw many more frogs scrambling out from behind the tree.

S.FORM: wada wada di dahaka dahaka huling na nii di maha sapah daha di.
S.TRANSL: 他和他的狗便回家了。
So he and his dog go home.

S.FORM: ma meniq ka qpatun nii hbaro wg waga tloong bobo qhuni wa dmeeda dheya ka wada dmidin kingan qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 接著，剩下的青蛙便坐在樹上，目送他們。其中一隻被(小孩)帶走了。
Then, the rest of the frogs sat on the tree, looking at them. One of the frogs had been brought away (by the kid).
